reviews.review_description: May i be a mod  i want   to make the community a better place if i become mod i will make sure if people are cussing or being toxic i will banded them, also i rate this game five stars.

developer_response.body: We love that you want to help our staff team! We currently have enough staff for the job tho! Thanks so much for the good review and we hope you continue enjoying our game!

reviews.review_description: It’s a fun little puzzle game 100% worth my time and almost made me have a heart attack but that’s what I was looking for recommended 100% (unless heart problems)

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback we love that your enjoying our game!

reviews.review_description: It doesn’t matter if your mod or not it has a amazing horror mode and probly one of my best horror games I ever seen but I know some day it’ll get up there just some day

developer_response.body: Thanks for leaving a good review! We have high hopes for the game and glad you do to! Have fun!

reviews.review_description: You need to check this game out👍

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the positive review! We appreciate your enjoying our game and hope you continue playing!
